ham.subject: Corporate VPN Maintenance Notice – Scheduled Downtime on 15th April
ham.body:
Dear Team,

Please be advised that the Corporate VPN will undergo scheduled maintenance on Thursday, 15th April from 10:00 PM to 2:00 AM IST. During this window, all VPN connections will be unavailable.

To minimise disruption:
1. Plan your remote work accordingly.
2. If you need to access critical resources, plan to use the on‑premise network or set up a temporary access point.
3. For any assistance or to report issues, contact IT Support at it.support@company.com.

Thank you for your cooperation.

Regards,
IT Support Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Your Crypto Wallet Has Been Suspended! Verify Now!
spam.body:
Hello,

We regret to inform you that your Crypto Wallet account (ID: 987654321) has been temporarily suspended due to suspicious activity. To restore access immediately, please verify your account details by clicking the link below:

<URL>

Please note: If you do not verify within 48 hours, your wallet will be permanently blocked and all funds may be forfeited.

Thank you for your prompt attention.

Sincerely,
CryptoSecure Support Team
